description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: Event ID. KMSat.Event.user.email The target mail for this event.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.id

outputs.description: The ID of the user the event is targeted to. KMSat.Event.user.archived Whether the user is archived or not.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.user.id

outputs.description: The event's external ID. KMSat.Event.source The source of the event.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.external_id

outputs.description: The event description. KMSat.Event.occurred_date The date the event occurred.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.description

outputs.description: The event's risk level. KMSat.Event.risk.factor The event's risk factor.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.risk.level

outputs.description: The risk's decay mode. KMSat.Event.risk.expire_date The event's expiration date.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.risk.decay_mode

outputs.description: The ID of the event type. KMSat.Event.event_type.name The name of the event type.
outputs.name: KMSat.Event.event_type.id
